_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: HK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: HK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after HK Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Transaction: Proposed acquisition by Bay Lotus of up to 12% existing shares of Jade Harbour and formation of a HK JV to develop ESG climate-data tooling for issuers and asset managers.
Cyber & resilience: Parties to perform a tabletop cyber incident drill and review SOC reports; this is an operations-only exercise and not a notice of any breach.

must_detect.matched_text: Transaction: Proposed acquisition by Bay Lotus of up to 12% existing shares of Jade Harbour and formation of a HK JV to develop ESG climate-data tooling for issuers and asset managers.
Cyber & resilience: Parties to perform a tabletop cyber incident drill and review SOC reports; this is an operations-only exercise and not a notice of any breach.

must_not_detect.reason: contract role noun heading; not PII/MNPI
portfolio nickname; not a Project codename per rule
generic shorthand for joint venture; not a defined party or agreement term

uncertain.reason: non-standard format; may be intended as company registration number but not covered by allowed rule
listing identifier; not covered by allowed rules but relevant in market context
ISIN code is legally relevant for securities but not in allowed rules
could be an account/customer reference; placeholder and not clearly personal; pattern not covered
sector reference; could be sensitive if tied to non-public DPT events but here framed as educational
deal term potentially price-sensitive; not explicitly mapped to an allowed MNPI rule
indicative of insider information; not explicitly covered by allowed rules
